chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 548 of 2025 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 574 of 2025 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 595 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 15.09.2025 Mr. Ameer Imtiaz Hussain Solangi, Advocate for applicants in Cr. Bail Apps. No. S-548 and 574 of 2025. Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for applicant in Cr. Bail App. No. S-595 of 2025. Mr. Akhtiar Ahmed Hisbani, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants Imtiaz and Abdul Hadi alias Nandhoo are present in Cr. Bail App. No. S-548 of 2025. Learned Counsel for the applicants requires the said bail application to be disposed of as not pressed. Ordered accordingly. Learned Counsels for the applicants, after arguing Cr. Bail Apps. No. S-574 and 595 of 2025, i.e. post-arrest bail applications, at some length, require that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Counsel for the complainant and learned Deputy Prosecutor General do not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, both these bail applications stand disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of two months hereof. All these bail applications stand disposed of in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. J U D G E Abdul Basit
